prompt: I just exported my Apple Health data from my iPhone. It's in the apple_health_export folder. Can you analyze it and tell me what's going on with my health?

assertions.name: has_executive_summary
assertions.description: Report starts with an executive summary of 3-5 key findings

assertions.name: has_health_dashboard
assertions.description: Contains a composite health score table with letter grades

assertions.name: has_data_quality
assertions.description: Contains a data availability/quality assessment section

assertions.name: has_risk_flags
assertions.description: Contains risk stratification with HIGH/MODERATE severity levels

assertions.name: has_causal_inference
assertions.description: Presents Granger causality or transfer entropy results

assertions.name: has_biological_age
assertions.description: Presents fitness age or biological age estimate

assertions.name: reports_confidence_intervals
assertions.description: Uses bootstrap CI or p-values for at least some metrics

assertions.name: no_missing_data_crash
assertions.description: Handles all data types gracefully without errors
